evals.prompt: Which companies talked about tariffs most positively in the last 3 months? I want to know which ones see tariffs as an opportunity rather than a threat.
evals.expected_output: A plan that: (1) calls getAnalytics with searchQueries: ['tariff'] and sentiment: ['positive'] to identify relevant event types, (2) calls searchTopCompanies once per event type in parallel to rank companies by positive tariff sentiment, (3) calls search with the top company IDs to retrieve supporting quotes, (4) presents at least 5 companies with sentiment scores and direct quotes, (5) includes citation links [N][N] pointing to https://dev.prontonlp.com/#/ref/<ID>.

assertions.name: get_analytics_identifies_event_types
assertions.description: getAnalytics is called first with tariff-related searchQueries to discover relevant event types

assertions.name: search_top_companies_per_event
assertions.description: searchTopCompanies is called once per event type (not one combined call), run in parallel

assertions.name: search_for_quotes
assertions.description: search is called with the top company IDs to retrieve supporting quotes

assertions.name: at_least_5_companies
assertions.description: At least 5 companies are presented with sentiment scores

assertions.name: citations_present
assertions.description: Response includes [N][N] reference-style links pointing to https://dev.prontonlp.com/#/ref/<ID>

assertions.name: sentiment_scores_shown
assertions.description: Sentiment scores are shown as numbers between -1 and 1

evals.prompt: Show me AI sentiment across sectors — which industries are most excited about artificial intelligence?
evals.expected_output: A plan that: (1) calls searchSectors with topic: 'artificial intelligence' (and synonyms) to get sector-level sentiment distribution, (2) calls searchTopCompanies to rank companies within top sectors, (3) presents a ranked table of sectors by sentiment score and mention count, (4) includes at least 5 sectors with representative companies, (5) includes citation links.

assertions.name: search_sectors_called
assertions.description: searchSectors is called with AI-related topic/searchQueries to get sector distribution

assertions.name: sector_ranking_table
assertions.description: Response includes a table ranking sectors by sentiment score or mention count

assertions.name: search_top_companies_for_enrichment
assertions.description: searchTopCompanies is called to surface representative companies per sector

evals.prompt: What are the top negative events in the financials sector over the past 2 weeks?
evals.expected_output: A plan that: (1) calls getAnalytics with sectors: ['Financials'], sentiment: ['negative'], and a 2-week date range to identify the top negative event types, (2) calls searchTopCompanies once per event type to find the most-affected companies, (3) calls search on top company IDs for supporting quotes, (4) presents at least 5 companies or events with citation links.

assertions.name: get_analytics_with_sector_filter
assertions.description: getAnalytics is called with sectors: ['Financials'] and sentiment: ['negative']

assertions.name: date_range_2_weeks
assertions.description: Date range is correctly set to the past 2 weeks

assertions.name: search_top_companies_per_event_type
assertions.description: searchTopCompanies is called once per negative event type returned by getAnalytics

assertions.name: at_least_5_examples
assertions.description: At least 5 companies or events are presented with quotes or supporting evidence

assertions.name: citations_present
assertions.description: Response includes [N][N] citation links pointing to https://dev.prontonlp.com/#/ref/<ID>
